Text1.label: FIRST: The name of the limited liability partnership* (in its home jurisdiction)

Check Box18.label: SECOND: (Check box only if applicable) This is a professional limited liability partnership** qualified pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A

Text2.label: SECOND: (used only when checkbox 18 is set) provide the following professional services:

Text3.label: THIRD: …the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to do business in the State of Maine is

Text4.label: FOURTH (For a professional LLP only): All of the professional limited liability partnership's partners are licensed in one or more states to render the professional services for which it has been formed

Check Box19.label: [ ] Form FICT-4 accompanies this application.
Check Box19.binding_source: single yes/this-applies checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; retyped from the migration-era text binding (non-boolean-key /Btn sweep; see tools/equivalence_check.py).

Text7.label: FIFTH: Address of the registered or principal office, wherever located, is: (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)

Text8.label: (mailing address if different from above) [principal office]

Text9.label: SIXTH: The nature of the business or purposes to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is

Check Box20.label: SEVENTH: The Registered Agent is a: (select either a Commercial or Noncommercial Registered Agent)
Check Box20.binding_source: independent checkboxes (each on-state Yes) by geometry+text on page 1: Check Box20 y=71.6 = 'Commercial Registered Agent'; Check Box21 y=131.9 = 'Noncommercial Registered Agent'. Replaces the migration-era text binding that fanned the literal type string onto both boxes (registered_agent.type checkbox-fan sweep; see tools/equivalence_check.py).

Text11.label: Commercial path: (name of commercial registered agent)

Text13.label: Noncommercial path: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)

Text14.label: Noncommercial path: (mailing address if different from above)
